creator: pgollucci@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ruben van Staveren wrote:
> 
> I see that in the meantime a new port has appeared, too bad they didn't 
> contact the maintainer of sysutils/linux-megacli
> 
> I think it is confusing for end users of the original port to see it 
> disappear and then reappear by another maintainer without a clear 
> reason. There might be some fixes in this port sysutils/linux-megacli2 
> does not have. I leave it to portsmgr@ on which port continues to exist.
I was under the impression from the previous PR (thats my bad for not double 
checking before committing it) that 1.x and 2.x were for different cards.

I'm a big fan of the Dell PowerEdges and perc 5i/6i/6e

They are also seeing use at the Apache Software Foundation so I'm very 
interested in sorting this out.
